title: Method for operating a combustion system
abstract: The present invention relates to a method for operating a combustion system (10, 10a) of a combustion section (12) of a gas turbine engine (14) comprising at least one main burner arrangement (16) and at least one pilot burner arrangement (18), wherein the at least one main burner arrangement (16) and the at least one pilot burner arrangement (18) are operated with an air-fuel mixture (20) and wherein the at least one main burner arrangement (16) is operated with O 2 -lean air (22), wherein the method comprises the steps of: Increasing the percentage of oxygen of the air-fuel mixture (20) of the at least one pilot burner arrangement (18) by feeding of air (24) having a higher percentage of oxygen than the O 2 -lean air (22).
claims:
Claims 1. Method for operating a combustion system (10, 10a) of a combustion section (12) of a gas turbine engine (14) compris- ing at least one main burner arrangement (16) and at least one pilot burner arrangement (18), wherein the at least one main burner arrangement (16) and the at least one pilot burner arrangement (18) are operated with an air-fuel mixture (20) and wherein the at least one main burner arrangement (16) is operated with 02-lean air (22), wherein the method comprises the steps of: - increasing the percentage of oxygen of the air-fuel mixture (20) of the at least one pilot burner arrangement (18) by feeding of air (24) having a higher percentage of oxygen than the 02-lean air (22) . 2. A method according to claim 1, wherein the method further comprises the step(s) of: - increase the percentage of oxygen of an air (22) of the air-fuel mixture (20) of the at least one pilot burner ar Â¬ rangement (18) and/or the percentage of oxygen of a fuel (26) of the air-fuel mixture (20) of the at least one pilot burner arrangement (18) and/or the percentage of oxygen of the air- fuel mixture (20) of the at least one pilot burner arrange- ment (18) by feeding of air (24) having a higher percentage of oxygen than the 02-lean air (22) . 3. A method according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the method further comprises the step(s) of: - enriching the air (22) of the air-fuel mixture (20) of the at least one pilot burner arrangement (18) and/or the fuel (26) of the air-fuel mixture (20) of the at least one pilot burner arrangement (18) and/or the air-fuel mixture (20) of the at least one pilot burner arrangement (18) with air (24) so that a percentage of oxygen of the air-fuel mixture (20) burned by the at least one pilot burner arrangement (18) is at least 5% higher than an a percentage of oxygen of the air (22) feed to the at least one pilot burner arrangement (18) . 4. A method according to any preceding claim, wherein the air of the air-fuel mixture (20) of the at least one pilot burner arrangement (18) beforehand of the mixing with the air (24) having a higher percentage of oxygen than the 02-lean air (22) is 02-lean air (22) . 5. A method according to preceding claim 4, wherein the method further comprises the step of: - providing the 02-lean air (22) from an oxygen-extraction process . 6. A method according to any preceding claim, wherein the method comprises the step of: - providing the air (24) having a higher percentage of oxygen than 02-lean air (22) from a compressor discharge of a compressor section (28) of the gas turbine engine (14) . 7. A method according to any preceding claim, wherein the method comprises the steps of: - determining a feeding pressure of the air (24) having a higher percentage of oxygen than the 02-lean air (22) and/or determining a feeding pressure the fuel (26) and, - controlling a flame stability of a pilot flame (30) of the at least one pilot burner arrangement (18) due to the deter Â¬ mined feeding pressure of the air (24) having a higher percentage of oxygen than the 02-lean air (22) and/or the feeding pressure the fuel (26) . 8. A method according to any preceding claim, wherein the method comprises the step of: - controlling a feeding of the air (24) having a higher percentage of oxygen than the 02-lean air (22) by at least one valve ( 32 ) . 9. Combustion system (10, 10a) of a combustion section (12) of a gas turbine engine (14) comprising at least one main burner arrangement (16) and at least one pilot burner ar- 

rangement (18), wherein the at least one main burner arrange Â¬ ment (16) and the at least one pilot burner arrangement (18) are operateable with an air-fuel mixture (20) and wherein the at least one main burner arrangement (16) is operateable with 02-lean air (22), characterised by at least one mixing device (34) that is able to increasing the percentage of oxygen of the air-fuel mix Â¬ ture (20) of the at least one pilot burner arrangement (18) by feeding of air (24) having a higher percentage of oxygen than the 02-lean air (22) . 10. Combustion system according to claim 9, characterized by at least one feed line (36, 36a) for the air (24) having a higher percentage of oxygen than 02-lean air (22), at least one feed line (38) for the 02-lean air (22) and at least one fuel feed line (40), wherein the at least one mixing device (34) is positioned to be feed with air (24) having a higher percentage of oxygen than the 02-lean air (22) by the at least one feed line (36, 36a) for the air (24) having a higher percentage of oxygen than the 02-lean air (22) and with the 02-lean air (22) by the at least one feed line (38) for 02-lean air (22) and with fuel (26) by the at least one fuel feed line (40) . 11. Combustion system according to claim 9 or 10, wherein the at least one feed line (36) for the air (24) hav Â¬ ing a higher percentage of oxygen than 02-lean air (22) connects a compressor section (28) of the gas turbine engine (14) with the at least one pilot burner arrangement (18) . 12. Combustion system according to claim 9 or 10, wherein the at least one feed line (36a) for the air (24) having a higher percentage of oxygen than the 02-lean air (22) connects a high pressure air source (42), especially an external high pressure air source (42), with the at least one pilot burner arrangement (18) . 13. Combustion system according to any one of claims 9 or 12, characterised by at least one valve (32) to control a feed of air (24) having a higher percentage of oxygen than the 0 2 _ lean air (22) to the at least one feed line (36a) for the air (24) having a higher percentage of oxygen than the 02-lean air (22 ) . 14. Combustion system according to any one of claims 9 to 13 for operating the method according to any one of claims 1 to 8. 15. Gas turbine engine (14) with at least one combustion sys Â¬ tem (10) according to any one of claims 9 to 14.
